prompt_shape_note: judge.agent.md has no task-input placeholders, so trainer-optimize cannot inject row-specific task content into the rendered prompt.

attempts.summary: Trainer.dev() in this environment rejects APO because the algorithm is not a FastAlgorithm.
VERL import failed because the hydra dependency is missing from the environment.

decision: Do not claim a meaningful APO optimization run for this iteration. Keep the manual rewrite, preserve the synthesized llm_judge datasets, and treat full optimize as blocked until an input-aware wrapper or runtime support is added and the environment is fixed.
